detailedDescription:
A capable mid-range Turing GPU for 1440p gaming.
8GB GDDR6 with hardware ray tracing and DLSS for smooth, high-quality visuals.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: TU106 | Architecture: Turing
CUDA Cores: 2304 | RT Cores: 36 | Tensor Cores: 288
VRAM: 8GB GDDR6 (256-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 448 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4, 1x HDMI 2.0, 1x USB-C (VirtualLink)
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 3.0)
Recommended PSU: 650W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
